one_line_ask: Take our raw skincare hero shot, flat logo mark, texture plate and SKU copy sheet and produce a clinically clean white-background product image set, an editable vector logo, a recommended type system, packaging-safe outpainted canvases, a clinical monochrome variant, per-SKU print labels merged from our label template, and a print-ready packaging PDF — all assembled on one presentation board.
brief: We're launching DERMAVERA, a premium clinically-tested skincare line, and need a cohesive, credible visual identity executed across the product line (3 launch SKUs: a Vitamin-C Serum, a Barrier Repair Cream, and a Gentle Gel Cleanser). The look must be clean, minimalist, modern, science-driven and trustworthy — premium without being flashy, professional without looking pharmaceutical. We are supplying: (1) one raw hero photograph of the Serum bottle shot on a near-white sweep (slightly tilted, mixed lighting, cluttered edges); (2) a flat high-res raster of our chosen logo mark (a minimal molecule/droplet monogram + "DERMAVERA" wordmark) that we need delivered as a clean editable vector; (3) a soft lifestyle texture plate (matte stone surface) for collateral grounding; (4) a label-copy spreadsheet with one row per SKU (name, claim, volume, INCI line, batch placeholder, hex accent). We also supply our pre-authored print templates: an Illustrator label template (label.ai) with genuine Variables, and an InDesign unit-carton template (carton.indd).
